stories.title: Mia and the Missing Crayon
stories.summary: Mia learns that sharing helps everyone draw.
stories.text: Mia could not find her red crayon before art time. Jay smiled and shared his crayon box. They drew one giant dragon with rainbow scales. At the end, Mia said, "Sharing made our picture even better!"

stories.title: Benny the Brave Bubble
stories.summary: A tiny bubble goes on a big windy trip.
stories.text: Benny the bubble floated out of the wand and into the playground. He bounced past a swing, a slide, and a laughing puppy. A soft breeze carried him to a flower bed where he popped with a sparkle. The kids cheered, "Best bubble adventure ever!"

stories.title: Nia's Rain Boot Parade
stories.summary: Rainy weather turns into a joyful marching game.
stories.text: Rain tapped on the roof, so Nia wore her yellow boots. She made a parade line with her brother and teddy bear. They marched through puddles and counted splash sounds together. When the sun came out, they bowed like parade stars.

stories.title: Leo and the Tiny Seed
stories.summary: Leo discovers patience while growing a plant.
stories.text: Leo planted a tiny seed in a cup of soil. Every morning he added water and whispered, "Grow, little friend." On day five, a green sprout peeked up and waved in the light. Leo clapped and named it Captain Leaf.

stories.title: Zara's Counting Picnic
stories.summary: Zara counts snack items to make a fair picnic.
stories.text: Zara spread a blanket and lined up snacks for her friends. She counted four apples, four crackers, and four juice boxes. Everyone got the same number and felt happy. Zara said, "Counting helps us share fairly."

stories.title: Theo the Shape Detective
stories.summary: Theo finds shapes hiding all around the house.
stories.text: Theo wore a paper detective hat and searched for shapes. The wall clock was a circle, the window was a square, and the pizza slice was a triangle. He drew each shape in his notebook. Mom gave him a shiny sticker for solving the case.

stories.title: Coco and the Kind Cookie
stories.summary: Coco chooses kindness during snack time.
stories.text: Coco had one cookie left when she saw Sam forgot his snack. She split her cookie into two careful pieces. Sam smiled so wide that Coco smiled too. The cookie tasted sweeter when shared.

stories.title: Milo's Moonlight Drum
stories.summary: Milo makes a gentle night rhythm for his neighborhood.
stories.text: Milo tapped a drum softly on the porch: tap, tap, pause, tap. Fireflies blinked like tiny stage lights. His sister added claps and they made a quiet night song. Even the cat purred to the beat.

stories.title: Ava and the Sleepy Star
stories.summary: Ava helps a tired star find bedtime calm.
stories.text: A little star was still shining too bright at bedtime. Ava taught it to breathe in, breathe out, and blink slowly. Soon the star glowed softly like a night lamp. Ava whispered, "Good night, sky friend."

stories.title: Team Tiger Treasure Hunt
stories.summary: Friends follow clues and win by working together.
stories.text: Team Tiger found a map with three clues around the classroom. One clue was under a chair, one by the books, and one near the blocks. They solved every clue by taking turns and listening. The treasure was a box of shiny friendship badges.

months.title: January - Feelings and Friendship
months.goal: Read 10 minutes daily and name one feeling each day.

months.title: February - Letters and Sounds
months.goal: Find five beginning sounds at home each week.

months.title: March - Nature and Weather
months.goal: Talk about the weather every morning after reading.

months.title: April - Numbers and Patterns
months.goal: Count objects while reading and continue simple patterns.

months.title: May - Colors and Art
months.goal: Read color words and match them to real objects.

months.title: June - Animals and Homes
months.goal: Name one animal and where it lives after reading.

months.title: July - Family and Community
months.goal: Describe helpers in your family and neighborhood.

months.title: August - Music and Rhythm
months.goal: Clap a simple beat while reading rhyming lines.

months.title: September - School Adventures
months.goal: Read short school stories and talk about routines.

months.title: October - Problem Solvers
months.goal: Pause during reading and predict what happens next.
